nodes.title: Save Button
nodes.full_text: The save button isn't glorious enough yet

nodes.title: Nodes
nodes.full_text: The default width of a node should match the length of the random title

nodes.title: He headed off once
nodes.full_text:
Carrying three luxurious plums on a wooden tray
As is tradition

nodes.title: But as he walked
nodes.full_text:
The plums would topple back and forth
So started commanding the plums
Be still or I will eat you!
They kept toppling
So he ate two of them

nodes.title: The third he carried all the way
nodes.full_text: It was a special gift for someone.

nodes.title: That Someone
nodes.full_text: Happened to be in a good mood, so they accepted the gift

nodes.title: Then thanked him
nodes.full_text: And asked if he could share some stories

nodes.title: Feeling that his journey had been successful
nodes.full_text:
And before too long decided to visit again
This time bringing turnips rather than plums
Hoping they would stay on the tray better

nodes.title: The Editors Spellchecker
nodes.full_text: It should also check the spelling in the title

nodes.title: On the way there met a friend
nodes.full_text: Who suggested that in retrospect he probably should have brought figs instead

nodes.title: He considered this
nodes.full_text: Went and sold the turnips and bought some figs instead

nodes.title: That Someone
nodes.full_text:
This time they where in a foul mood
And showed him directly to the door
Ordering the figs thrown at his head

nodes.title: He started praising God in Gratitude
nodes.full_text: Which felt strange to the people throwing figs at his head

nodes.title: I'm grateful I brought Figs
nodes.full_text: Otherwise you would be throwing considerably heavier things at my head
